name: Asus PG34WCDM (OLED Panel, Res: 3440×1440, 240Hz, 0.03ms GTG, Curved )
highlights: ROG Swift OLED PG34WCDM is a cutting-edge 34-inch ultra-wide gaming monitor featuring a 3440×1440 WOLED panel with an 800R curve, lightning-fast 0
03ms response time, and a blistering 240Hz refresh rate
With 99% DCI-P3 color gamut, 1,500,000:1 contrast ratio, and DisplayHDR 400 True Black certification, it delivers immersive visuals and unmatched color accuracy
Packed with premium features like Smart KVM, USB-C 90W power delivery, and Adaptive-Sync, this monitor is built for serious gamers and creative professionals alike
